entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 39
entries.excerpt: “And Joseph was brought down to Egypt by the Midianites; and Potiphar, an officer of Pharaoh’s, captain of the guard, bought him” (Gen 39:1). And Potiphar became rich through Joseph, as Laban had been enriched through his father. Joseph’s mistress fell in love with him and said to him: “Lie with me” (Gen 39:7). But when, having tried every cunning, she could not move him, then, to overcome him, by a trick she brought him into her chamber.…
